RF1_test_scaffold.evidence: test-motor.ts exists (562 lines) with TestResult interface, TestFn type, runner with PASS/FAIL/SKIP summary. 8 named test functions. Exports runMotorTest(db) for Electron integration.

RF2_corte_semanal.evidence: getWeeks() in validacao-compartilhada.ts:68 accepts optional corte_semanal param. Motor (gerador.ts:115-116) queries empresa.corte_semanal and passes to getWeeks in FASE 3 (line 203) and to validarRegras in FASE 6 (line 608). Validador (validador.ts:74-77) also queries empresa and passes to validarRegras (line 126). R5 in validarRegras uses corte_semanal via getWeeks (line 214). Default SEG for backward compat.

RF3_max_minutos_dia.evidence: ColabValidacao interface expanded with max_minutos_dia (validacao-compartilhada.ts:13). R4b rule (lines 198-208) checks cel.minutos > c.max_minutos_dia as HARD violation. Gerador already has max_minutos_dia from JOIN (ColabComContrato line 27). Validador typed result includes max_minutos_dia (line 45).

RF4_repair_no_pinned.evidence: FASE 4.5 (gerador.ts:428-434): After scoring streak candidates, unpinned filter applied. If unpinned.length === 0, repair skipped with continue (FASE 6 flags R1). bestDay selected only from unpinned array.

RF5_threshold_corrected.evidence: gerador.ts line 268: uses tempConsec > CLT.MAX_DIAS_CONSECUTIVOS (not >=). All 3 uses of MAX_DIAS_CONSECUTIVOS in gerador (lines 255, 268, 418) now consistently use >. CLT.MAX_DIAS_CONSECUTIVOS = 6, so > 6 means 7+ triggers, allowing 6 consecutive (correct per CLT).

RF6_validator_robustness.evidence_lookback: validador.ts lines 79-124: loads previous OFICIAL escala, computes diasConsec and domConsec from last 7 days of alocacoes. Falls back to zeros if no OFICIAL exists.
RF6_validator_robustness.evidence_estagiario: validacao-compartilhada.ts lines 171-184: R3b ESTAGIARIO_DOMINGO rule. If !c.trabalha_domingo and Sunday TRABALHO -> HARD violation.
RF6_validator_robustness.evidence_timeout: tipc.ts lines 16-26: withTimeout<T> helper using Promise.race with 30s timeout. Applied to both escalas.ajustar (line 533) and escalas.gerar (line 637). On timeout: worker.terminate() + humanized error.
RF6_validator_robustness.evidence_input_val: gerador.ts lines 73-80: validates setor exists (ativo=1), data_inicio <= data_fim, colabs > 0. tipc.ts line 494-496: validates alocacoes array not empty for escalas.ajustar.
RF6_validator_robustness.evidence_meta_diaria: validacao-compartilhada.ts lines 89-91: calcMetaDiariaMin exported. gerador.ts line 487: uses calcMetaDiariaMin instead of inline formula.

RF7_pinned_all_phases.evidence: FASE 2 (lines 176-187): getPinned overrides status. FASE 3 (line 208): isPinned guard on non-domingo Sunday folga. FASE 3 weekDays filter (lines 216-218): excludes pinned. FASE 4 (lines 337, 349, 382): isPinned checks. FASE 4.5 (lines 418, 429-434): isPinned + unpinned filter. FASE 5 (lines 473-484): pinned TRABALHO with hours skipped. FASE 6 (line 608): validation runs on ALL cells including pins. Backward compat verified: without pinnedCells, isPinned always false, getPinned always undefined.

RF8_worker_pinned.evidence: worker.ts lines 5-13: WorkerInput has pinnedCellsArr. Lines 17-20: toPinnedMap converts to Map. Line 28-36: passes pinnedCells to gerarProposta. TypeScript compiles cleanly.

RF9_tests_expanded.evidence: test-motor.ts has 8 test functions: testBasic4Setores (4 setores, 0 HARD), testPinnedFolgaBasic (pin 1 FOLGA), testLookback (cross-escala with mock OFICIAL), testEstagiarioDomingo (no estagiario on Sunday), testR2Descanso (11h inter-jornada), testPinnedConflito (7 consecutive TRABALHO -> HARD R1), testCoberturaImpossivel (impossible demand -> no crash, SOFT), testCorteSemanal (QUI_QUA weeks). All DB-mutating tests have try/finally cleanup.

CA1_zero_hard.evidence: testBasic4Setores exercises all 4 seed setores with 0 HARD requirement. TypeScript compiles. Build succeeds. Tests structured to verify pontuacao and cobertura.

CA2_validator_last_barrier.evidence: Lookback: validador.ts loads OFICIAL escala (lines 79-124). Estagiario: R3b rule in validacao-compartilhada.ts (lines 171-184). max_minutos_dia: R4b rule (lines 198-208). metaDiariaMin: shared function used by gerador (line 487).

CA3_smart_recalc.evidence: testPinnedFolgaBasic verifies pin 1 FOLGA + 0 HARD. testPinnedConflito verifies 7 TRABALHO pins preserved + R1 HARD (correct). FASE 4.5 repair skips all-pinned streaks. Backward compat: no pinnedCells = same behavior.

CA4_production_robustness.evidence: Timeout: withTimeout 30s in tipc.ts. Input validation: gerador.ts lines 73-80 + tipc.ts line 494-496. corte_semanal: testCorteSemanal exercises QUI_QUA. TypeScript: 0 errors. Build: succeeds.

constraints_verification.C1_snake_case: pass — no camelCase in DB fields, JSON keys, or TS interface fields across motor files. ColabValidacao uses max_minutos_dia, dias_trabalho, trabalha_domingo.
constraints_verification.C2_worker_thread: pass — motor runs in worker thread (worker.ts), IPC spawns workers (tipc.ts lines 511-531, 610-635). Timeout prevents UI freeze.
constraints_verification.C3_no_schema_changes: pass — no modifications to src/main/db/schema.ts or seed.ts. Verified by file inspection.
constraints_verification.C4_backward_compat: pass — getWeeks defaults to SEG. isPinned returns false when pinnedCells undefined. gerarProposta signature unchanged (pinnedCells is optional).
constraints_verification.C5_follow_patterns: pass — follows existing tipc patterns, validacao-compartilhada module structure, worker thread pattern.
constraints_verification.C6_no_frontend: pass — only src/main/motor/* and src/main/tipc.ts modified. Zero changes to src/renderer/ or src/shared/.

issues.description: withTimeout does not clear the setTimeout timer when the worker promise resolves first. The orphaned timeout fires harmlessly (worker.terminate on completed worker is a no-op) but the reject() creates an uncaught promise rejection in Node.js since the losing Promise in Promise.race has no .catch handler.
issues.fix_required: Wrap with clearTimeout: store the timer ID, clear it when workerPromise resolves. Or wrap the timeout promise rejection in a try/catch. Non-blocking because Electron suppresses these warnings in production and worker.terminate on a finished worker is harmless.

issues.description: R4 (MAX_JORNADA_DIARIA, CLT global 600min) and R4b (CONTRATO_MAX_DIA, per-contract) can both fire on the same cell. For a CLT 44h worker, max_minutos_dia=600 equals the CLT max, so only one fires. But for edge cases (e.g., manual override > 600min on an estagiario with max=240min), both rules fire producing two HARD violations for the same cell.
issues.fix_required: Not strictly required — two distinct rules violated is technically correct. Could add skip condition in R4b if already caught by R4, but current behavior is defensible. Non-blocking.

suggestions.description: Consider making the 30s worker timeout configurable via empresa config or a constant. Large setores with many collaborators and long periods could legitimately take > 30s.

Tests currently require Electron context (npm run test:motor = build + electron --test-motor). For future CI/CD, consider extracting the test runner to work with a standalone better-sqlite3 instance via npx tsx, without requiring Electron.
R4 and R4b iterate over diasOrdered separately. Could be merged into a single loop for marginal performance improvement. Very minor — current structure is more readable.
